paragraphs.structure: Seven sentences building from distant approach to decisive action. Opens with rhythmic sound-image, expands through fleeting perspective, sustains chase energy, climaxes with athletic feat.
rhetorical-dna: Kinetic verbs anchor each sentence (examples: drummed, swept, jerked, sprang, landed)
Fleeting glimpse technique: protagonist seen through bystander eyes, mythologized by motion
Final sentence pivots from observer to actor's decisive move
Sensory layering: sound first, then color, then physical impact
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A moving figure makes a desperate, athletic maneuver onto a transport or through an obstacle.

paragraphs.structure: Six sentences tracing danger's approach through accumulating circumstances. Opens with pursuit, tracks ruin moving through ranks, ends with standout or resistant figure.
rhetorical-dna: Destruction-count progression: group damage/death, then named ones, then the whole mass falters
Physical strain made visceral through anatomical metaphor
Emotional punctuation: grief before destruction contrasts with curses/anger during life
Location personified—darkens or shifts soundscapes—mirroring crew's fate
Final sentence withholds method, promising action in next beat
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A group of people or objects falls one by one until a singular figure must act.

paragraphs.structure: Four sentences of pure combat fury. Short opener, then three increasingly brutal elaborations. Catalog of violence accelerates through compound verbs.
rhetorical-dna: Hurricane/blur metaphors externalize frenzied state
Equipment/tools given agency and sound (Example: 'sword sings its death-song', 'boots thundered the planking')
Anatomical catalog in accelerating rhythm
Interior state (Example: red mist) bleeds into exterior carnage
Sentence length mirrors escalation: tight opening, then sprawling destruction
paragraphs.respecification-seed: An actor enters a frenzy and slaughters or otherwise beats down enemies in graphic excess.

paragraphs.structure: Three sentences building to frozen tableau. First continues violence, second reaches terminal moment, third crystallizes stillness through simile.
rhetorical-dna: Opening grants temporary mythic/invulnerable quality
Death-readiness as characterization: no retreat
External interruption breaks momentum without protagonist agency
Simile freezes all motion simultaneously
Parallel final clause balances opposing forces in stalemate
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A cornered actor prepares for final stand or destruction, when outside force freezes the moment.

paragraphs.structure: Three sentences of lyric intensity. Opens with triadic simile chain, middle sentence shows effect on witnesses, long final sentence consummates encounter.
rhetorical-dna: Triadic simile structure elevates action to cosmic force
Opposites yoked (examples: creation and death, blood and starlight, ivory and black)
Color progression builds through contrast
Final sentence syntactically sprawling, mimicking overwhelming emotion
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A mesmerizing figure's performance ends with sudden surrender to the actor.
